prompt: Wide cinematic editorial photograph of the warm cheerful interior of a small neighborhood dog grooming salon at mid-morning, captured from a low corner viewpoint. A medium-sized happy dog stands calmly on the warm hardwood floor in the middle distance, mouth slightly open in a relaxed pant, tail in a loose mid-air wag, while a groomer in a plain apron crouches at eye level holding out a relaxed open hand. Through a tall side window on the camera-right, bright morning daylight pours in across soft coral-peach plaster walls and a long wooden bench, leaving deep aubergine-shadowed corners on the camera-left side of the frame for editorial overlay text. A small potted plant sits by the window, a leather tool roll rests on the bench. The composition leaves the upper-left third of the frame as quiet wall and shadow space; the dog and groomer are positioned right of center in the lower two-thirds. Honest documentary editorial style, joyful but grown-up, neutral honest color, palette built around soft coral-peach walls, deep aubergine accents in shadow, warm hardwood, and a single raspberry-red detail on the apron strap. Avoid: any text, signage, brand wordmarks on apron, walls, or bottles, coral-peach walls, beige or oat decor, sage or moss green decor, baby-pink spa decor, vet-clinic blue, corporate grey, ribbons, glitter, cartoon mascots, sterile vet-clinic lighting, dramatic horror-movie shadows, glamour beauty-shot lighting, fashion retouching, posed teeth-bared smiles, shallow trendy bokeh.

Side-profile photograph of a medium-sized goldendoodle standing on a hardwood salon floor before grooming, full uneven shaggy coat hanging long over the eyes and feet, calm expression, looking off to the right of the frame. Shot from low-medium angle at the dog's shoulder height, natural side window light coming from camera-right, soft warm shadows on the soft coral-peach wall behind. The dog is centered, leaving the upper third of the frame as quiet wall space. The setting is a clean small-business dog grooming salon — pale soft coral-peach walls, warm-toned hardwood floor, a single eucalyptus stem on a wooden side table at the edge of the frame. Editorial documentary style, neutral honest color, no filters. Avoid: any text, signage, brand wordmarks, pink or pastel decor, ribbons or bows, cartoon props, sterile vet-clinic lighting, shallow trendy bokeh, rhinestones, dramatic backlight, comic mascots, dirty or grimy surfaces. The image must be paired with an after photograph from the identical angle, distance, focal length, and lighting setup.

Side-profile photograph of the same medium-sized goldendoodle from the before shot, now freshly groomed in a tidy teddy-bear cut — even body length, neat round face, clean feet, eyes visible, calm and lighter on his feet, looking off to the right of the frame. Shot from the identical low-medium angle at shoulder height, identical natural side window light from camera-right, identical warm shadows on the same cream wall. The dog is centered in the same position as the before image, leaving the upper third of the frame as quiet wall space. Same clean small-business salon setting — soft coral-peach walls, warm hardwood floor, the same eucalyptus stem visible on the wooden side table at the edge. Editorial documentary style, neutral honest color. Avoid: any text or signage, pink or pastel decor, ribbons or bows, cartoon props, sterile vet-clinic lighting, dramatic backlight, glamour shots. The framing, focal length, light direction, and background must match the paired before image exactly so the only difference is the dog's coat.
